name: Classic Oatbites
description: Our signature rolled oats blended with raw organic honey and a hint of vanilla. The perfect healthy snack for any time of the day.

name: Premium Oat Milk
description: Rich, creamy, and dairy-free. Made from 100% organic whole grain oats. Perfect for your morning coffee or cereal.

name: Dark Chocolate Oat Granola
description: Crunchy oat clusters loaded with 70% dark chocolate chunks and roasted almonds. A decadent yet healthy breakfast.

name: Berry Burst Overnight Oats
description: A pre-mixed blend of chia seeds, dried mixed berries, and our premium oats. Just add milk and leave it overnight.

name: Matcha Oat Energy Bars
description: Fuel your day with these energy-packed bars made with Japanese ceremonial grade matcha, dates, and rolled oats.

name: Golden Turmeric Oat Cookies
description: Soft-baked oat cookies infused with turmeric, ginger, and a dash of black pepper for an antioxidant boost.
